name: Roni's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugars together until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Dissolve baking soda in hot water and add to the mixture.
4. Gradually add flour and salt (sifted together), mixing with an electric mixer.
5. Using your hands, gently fold in oats, chocolate chips, vanilla extract, and nuts (if desired). Mix until just combined.
6. Shape dough into slightly flattened walnut-sized balls using wet hands.
7. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes for chewy texture or 15 minutes for a crisper texture.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack.
VARIATIONS
Two more ways to make RONI'S CHOCOLATE CHIP COOKIES:
A: Add 2 tablespoons extra shortening and 4 teaspoons cocoa powder with the flour.
B: Add 2 squares melted chocolate to the sugar, shortening, egg mixture.
